metadata.description: Batch 32 — additional Oxford 5000 words 101-200; continuing IDs after Batch 31

words.definitionEn: a natural desire for food
words.definitionTh: ความอยากอาหาร
words.example: The new product increased customer appetite for innovation.

words.definitionEn: to show approval by clapping
words.example: Management applauded the team’s improvement.

words.definitionEn: relevant or able to be used in a situation
words.definitionTh: ใช้ได้ / เกี่ยวข้องได้
words.example: The standard is applicable to this production line.

words.definitionEn: a person who formally applies for something
words.example: Each applicant completed the technical test.

words.definitionEn: to officially choose someone for a role
words.example: The manager appointed a project owner.

words.definitionEn: recognition of value or gratitude
words.definitionTh: ความชื่นชม
words.example: The team expressed appreciation for the support.

words.definitionEn: in a suitable or correct way
words.definitionTh: อย่างเหมาะสม
words.example: The risk was appropriately classified.

words.definitionEn: based on personal choice rather than a clear reason
words.definitionTh: ตามอำเภอใจ
words.example: Avoid arbitrary scoring in the risk matrix.

words.definitionEn: relating to the design of buildings
words.definitionTh: ทางสถาปัตยกรรม
words.example: The drawing shows the architectural layout.

words.definitionEn: a collection of historical records
words.example: Store the approved report in the archive.

words.definitionEn: a place for sports or public events
words.definitionTh: เวที / สนาม
words.example: The technology is gaining attention in the industrial arena.

words.definitionEn: to provide with weapons
words.example: The security team is not permitted to arm visitors.

words.definitionEn: a large or ordered group of things
words.definitionTh: ชุด / การจัดเรียง
words.example: The system uses an array of sensors.

words.definitionEn: a pointed sign or object showing direction
words.example: Follow the arrow on the display.

words.definitionEn: to express ideas clearly
words.definitionTh: อธิบายได้ชัดเจน
words.example: The engineer articulated the technical risk clearly.

words.definitionEn: a painting, drawing, or other artistic creation
words.example: The packaging artwork requires approval.

words.definitionEn: the powder left after something burns
words.example: The sample contained traces of ash.

words.definitionEn: a strong hope or ambition
words.definitionTh: ความใฝ่ฝัน
words.example: Zero defects is the team’s long-term aspiration.

words.definitionEn: to strongly hope to achieve something
words.example: We aspire to automate the inspection process.

words.definitionEn: the planned killing of an important person
words.definitionTh: การลอบสังหาร
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “assassination”.

words.definitionEn: a violent physical attack
words.definitionTh: การทำร้าย / โจมตี
words.example: The policy prohibits assault in the workplace.

words.definitionEn: to bring parts or people together
words.example: Technicians assembled the camera bracket.

words.definitionEn: the act of joining parts or a gathered group
words.definitionTh: การประกอบ / ที่ประชุม
words.example: Inspect the assembly before operation.

words.definitionEn: to state something firmly
words.example: The supplier asserted that the part met the specification.

words.definitionEn: a confident statement of belief
words.example: The data supports the assertion.

words.definitionEn: something valuable owned or useful
words.example: The camera is a valuable production asset.

words.definitionEn: to give someone a particular task
words.example: Assign each action to an owner.

words.definitionEn: help or support
words.definitionTh: ความช่วยเหลือ
words.example: Contact maintenance for technical assistance.

words.definitionEn: something accepted as true without proof
words.definitionTh: ข้อสันนิษฐาน
words.example: Document every assumption in the analysis.

words.definitionEn: a confident promise or guarantee
words.example: The audit provides quality assurance.

words.definitionEn: to tell someone confidently that something is true
words.example: The validation results assure consistent performance.

words.definitionEn: extremely surprising
words.example: The trial produced an astonishing reduction in defects.

words.definitionEn: protection given by a country or an institution
words.definitionTh: สถานลี้ภัย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “asylum”.

words.definitionEn: relating to sports or physical ability
words.definitionTh: เกี่ยวกับกีฬา
words.example: The program supports athletic development.

words.definitionEn: an extremely cruel or violent act
words.definitionTh: การกระทำที่โหดร้าย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “atrocity”.

words.definitionEn: a file or object connected to something
words.definitionTh: สิ่งที่แนบมา
words.example: The drawing is included as an attachment.

words.definitionEn: to succeed in achieving something
words.example: The line attained the target accuracy.

words.definitionEn: the act of being present
words.definitionTh: การเข้าร่วม
words.example: Training attendance is recorded digitally.

words.definitionEn: a quality; to regard something as caused by something
words.definitionTh: คุณลักษณะ / ระบุสาเหตุ
words.example: The team attributed the fault to vibration.

words.definitionEn: a sale where goods go to the highest bidder
words.example: The old equipment was sold at auction.

words.definitionEn: relating to recorded or transmitted sound
words.example: The system records audio data.

words.definitionEn: an official examination of records or processes
words.definitionTh: การตรวจสอบ
words.example: The team conducted a safety audit.

words.definitionEn: genuine and not copied
words.example: Verify that the certificate is authentic.

words.definitionEn: to give official permission
words.example: Only managers can authorize the purchase.

words.definitionEn: a car
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “auto”.

words.definitionEn: freedom to make independent decisions
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นอิสระ
words.example: The controller operates with limited autonomy.

words.definitionEn: the season between summer and winter
words.definitionTh: ฤดูใบไม้ร่วง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “autumn”.

words.definitionEn: the state of being ready for use
words.definitionTh: ความพร้อมใช้งาน
words.example: Check spare-part availability before shutdown.

words.definitionEn: to wait for something
words.example: The team awaits final approval.

words.definitionEn: knowledge or understanding of a situation
words.definitionTh: ความตระหนักรู้
words.example: The campaign raised safety awareness.

words.definitionEn: difficult, uncomfortable, or not graceful
words.definitionTh: ไม่สะดวก / เก้ ๆ กัง ๆ
words.example: The sensor is in an awkward position.

words.definitionEn: the background to a scene or situation
words.example: The pilot ran against a backdrop of rising demand.

words.definitionEn: support given to a person or plan
words.definitionTh: การสนับสนุน
words.example: The proposal received management backing.

words.definitionEn: a copy kept in case the original is lost
words.definitionTh: ข้อมูลสำรอง
words.example: Create a backup before updating the software.

words.definitionEn: a small sign showing identity or achievement
words.example: Every visitor must wear a badge.

words.definitionEn: money or a condition allowing release before trial
words.definitionTh: การประกันตัว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “bail”.

words.definitionEn: stable and containing suitable proportions
words.example: Use a balanced scorecard for evaluation.

words.definitionEn: a form of dance using formal movements
words.example: The theatre presented a ballet performance.

words.definitionEn: a flexible bag filled with air or gas
words.example: The balloon expanded as pressure increased.

words.definitionEn: a system or paper used for secret voting
words.definitionTh: บัตรลงคะแนน
words.example: Members voted by secret ballot.

words.definitionEn: the legal state of being unable to pay debts
words.definitionTh: การล้มละลาย
words.example: The company entered bankruptcy proceedings.

words.definitionEn: a long sign carrying a message
words.example: The safety banner is displayed at the entrance.

words.definitionEn: not covered or containing only the minimum
words.definitionTh: เปลือย / ไม่มีสิ่งปกคลุม
words.example: Do not touch the bare wire.

words.definitionEn: only just; almost not
words.example: The signal was barely visible.

words.definitionEn: something bought cheaply or an agreement
words.definitionTh: การต่อรอง / ของราคาถูก
words.example: The used camera was a bargain.

words.definitionEn: a large round container
words.definitionTh: ถังทรงกระบอก
words.example: The liquid is stored in a barrel.

words.definitionEn: a floor below ground level
words.definitionTh: ชั้นใต้ดิน
words.example: The backup server is in the basement.

words.definitionEn: a container made of woven material
words.example: Place rejected parts in the red basket.

words.definitionEn: the lowest range of musical sound
words.example: The speaker produces a strong bass sound.

words.definitionEn: an object used to hit a ball
words.example: The player swung the bat.

words.definitionEn: a place where a battle is fought
words.example: The museum displays a map of the battlefield.

words.definitionEn: a curved area of sea partly enclosed by land
words.example: The ship entered the bay.

words.definitionEn: a long support or a narrow line of light
words.definitionTh: ลำแสง / คาน
words.example: Align the light beam with the sensor.

words.definitionEn: a large or dangerous animal
words.example: The story describes a mythical beast.

words.definitionEn: the interests or representation of someone
words.example: The supervisor signed on behalf of the team.

words.definitionEn: relating to behavior
words.definitionTh: ด้านพฤติกรรม
words.example: The study examines behavioral patterns.

words.definitionEn: greatly loved
words.definitionTh: เป็นที่รัก
words.example: The memorial honors a beloved teacher.

words.definitionEn: a long seat for several people
words.example: Place the sample on the test bench.

words.definitionEn: a standard used for comparison
words.definitionTh: เกณฑ์มาตรฐาน
words.example: Use the validated result as a benchmark.

words.definitionEn: in or to a lower position than
words.example: The cable runs beneath the conveyor.

words.definitionEn: producing a helpful or positive effect
words.definitionTh: เป็นประโยชน์
words.example: Preventive maintenance is beneficial to reliability.

words.definitionEn: a person who receives an advantage or payment
words.definitionTh: ผู้รับประโยชน์
words.example: The operator is the main beneficiary of the improvement.

words.definitionEn: next to
words.example: Install the cabinet beside the machine.

words.definitionEn: in addition to
words.example: Besides cost, consider maintenance effort.

words.definitionEn: to be disloyal or reveal something secretly
words.example: A sudden drift may betray a hidden fault.

words.definitionEn: a drink
words.definitionTh: เครื่องดื่ม
words.example: Only approved beverages are allowed in the rest area.

words.definitionEn: an unfair preference for or against something
words.example: Use random sampling to reduce selection bias.

words.definitionEn: an offer of money or an attempt to achieve something
words.definitionTh: ข้อเสนอ / เสนอราคา
words.example: Three suppliers submitted a bid.

words.definitionEn: to tie or hold things together
words.example: Use the clamp to bind the cables together.

words.definitionEn: the story of a person’s life written by another person
words.definitionTh: ชีวประวัติ
words.example: The library holds a biography of the inventor.

words.definitionEn: relating to living things
words.example: The laboratory monitors biological hazards.

words.definitionEn: a senior leader in some Christian churches
words.example: The bishop attended the ceremony.

words.definitionEn: very strange or unusual
words.definitionTh: แปลกประหลาด
words.example: The sensor produced a bizarre reading.

words.definitionEn: the sharp cutting part of a tool
words.example: Inspect the cutting blade before use.

words.definitionEn: a large warm covering
words.example: Cover the equipment with a protective blanket.

words.definitionEn: an explosion or strong burst
words.definitionTh: แรงระเบิด / ระเบิด
words.example: The shield protects workers from the blast.

words.definitionEn: to lose blood
words.definitionTh: มีเลือดออก
words.example: Stop the task if the worker begins to bleed.

words.definitionEn: to mix smoothly together
words.definitionTh: ผสม / ส่วนผสม
words.example: Blend the ingredients until smooth.

words.definitionEn: to ask for divine protection or express good wishes
words.example: The leader asked the community to bless the new center.

words.definitionEn: something welcomed or bringing benefit
words.example: Reliable data is a blessing for troubleshooting.
